quote: Great thoughts speak only to the thoughtful mind, but great actions speak to all mankind. – Theodore Roosevelt
fact: The characters Bert and Ernie on Sesame Street were named after Bert the cop and Ernie the taxi driver in Frank Capra`s "Its A Wonderful Life."
joke: Did you hear about the campsite that got visited by Bigfoot? It got in tents.
